name: Elder Titan
description: It is only right that I am cast into this world, for I had a hand in breaking it.

abilities.name: Momentum
abilities.description: Grants bonus armor corresponding to the Titan's movement speed. Momentum additionally grants attack speed corresponding to the Titan's movement speed. Move Speed to Armor Factor: 0.036. Armor Bonus Increase: 0.004. Move Speed to Attack Speed Bonus Factor: 0.2.

abilities.name: Echo Stomp
abilities.description: The Titan and its Spirit within both stomp the ground, dealing physical and magical damage while knocking nearby enemy units unconscious around their locations. Channel Time: 1.3. Radius: 475. Physical Damage: 60/100/140/180 (135/175/215/255). Magical Damage: 60/100/140/180 (135/175/215/255). Wake-up Damage Threshold: 55/120/185/250 (205/270/335/400). Stun Duration: 0.2. Cooldown: 14/13/12/11. Mana Cost: 100.

abilities.name: Astral Spirit
abilities.description: When the Spirit rejoins the Titan, it grants the Titan various bonuses per enemy hero it passed through. Grants Elder Titan magic resistance, and debuff immunity per affected enemy hero when the Spirit rejoins the Titan. Cast Range: 1200. Damage Radius: 275. Contact Damage: 50. Spirit Duration: 10. Max Move Speed Bonus: 40%. Move Speed Bonus per Enemy: 4%/5%/6%/7% (6.5%/7.5%/8.5%/9.5%). Cooldown: 23/21/19/17. Mana Cost: 80/90/100/110.

abilities.name: Natural Order
abilities.description: Reduces all elements to their basic levels, removing base armor and base magic resistance from nearby enemy units. The base armor reduction is centered around the Titan, while the base magic resistance reduction is centered around the Spirit. Radius: 350 (500). Base Armor Reduction: 40%/60%/80%/100%. Aura Linger Duration: 1. Base Magic Resistance Reduction: 40%/60%/80%/100%.

abilities.name: Earth Splitter
abilities.description: Sends forth a jagged crack in front of the Titan that implodes after a slight delay. The implosion applies movement speed slow, deals a half magicial and half physical damage corresponding to the affected enemy units' max health. Cast Range: 2400. Crack Width: 315. Crack Distance: 2100. Max Health as Magical Damage: 15%/20%/25%. Max Health as Physical Damage: 15%/20%/25%. Move Speed Slow: 30%/40%/50%. Cooldown: 100/95/90. Mana Cost: 125/175/225.
